name: Toasted Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Mix egg in food processor until smooth. Add sugar, butter, and vanilla; process together for a few seconds. Add flour, blending well. Stir in hazelnuts and pecans until the nuts are coarsely chopped. Spoon batter by teaspoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet (don't crowd). Bake for 3-4 minutes until crispy, about an additional 8-10 minutes total.
